reviews.review_description:
Overall a good game for a focus on exercise. I did the weight loss mode, I played a few of the boxing games and finished with arm training. 

Weight loss mode was good. There was some frustration with getting the app to recognize my skips, jogging in place. I tried to mimick the trainer and would at times generate a good rating in the needle. This was frustrating. The lateral strides were great. There was an alternating lunge exercise that requirex you to push your arms out. It felt way out of reach and was difficult to understand the intent of the cues.  Seems like you had to do a rear lunge moving the hands forward. Then only extending the appropriate hand forward to a ball that seemed to be too far from the start point. You had to scoot to the edge of the circle to trigger it.

I believe if they added a calibration for hands down at the side and hands forward that they could solve a myriad of issues and maybe add kn some new exercises. Interested to see what the future holds for this app. As the boring games were fun. The only one that I had an issue with was the spin attack. Great premise but it seems like the hit box for the player is huge when you are trying to dodge the red balls. The white ones felt easier to dodge.

There are also some issues in the arm training exercises. Namely when im doing biceps curl and the alternate version of it. The character that your supposed to be in sync with puts her arms by her side. However, your in game cues tell you that you are just moving your hands a few inches diagonally towards you. Not placing your hands by your side. The Pec Fly is decent but you have to move forward to the edge of the circle to be able to touch the cues. The arm circles are one of the best mapped exercises. 

All in all a decent experience that will hopefully improve with time and more content.

reviews.review_title: Just what I’ve been looking for
reviews.review_description: I’ve tried so many other fitness apps but this one has the proper gym classes / exercises I’ve wanted. It’s cheap enough to buy already but to get it in the Black Friday sale makes it even more of a bargain. Great workout and the boxing games are fun too. Is it perfect? Is any VR game perfect? But it’s very good from what I’ve played so far.
Love the game but how do you join online do you have to have a code to be online what button do I hit to join online

developer_response.body:
Hi Penguinshockey!!

Thanks so much for your comment :)

To join an online gymclass you need a code sent by a friend, or set up your own session.
There´s no open rooms to join with any user online.

Let me explain how to do a multiplayer session:
You can invite any friendthat owns the app in GymClasses.
Select a Gymclass, instead of hitting "Start", press the circular buttom on the rigth, this will generate a code, share with your friends the that code, when they are ready and joined you´ll see how the small icons representing your friend highlights, then start the session.

If a friend send you a code to join his gymclass, just go to the home screen of the interface and sellect the "insert code" button .

Hope this helps, if you have any other problem, or you still have some issues joining a Gymclass, please don´t hessitate to send us a mail to ::    exrciser-info@exrciser.com   :: and we´ll send you more detailed and visual instructions....
or just join the discord channel to get in touch :)

Enjoy your workouts!!

reviews.review_description:
Hi, Multiplayer doesent work. How can i start a MP Session.

Der Anbieter hat sich mit mir in Verbindung gesetzt und hat mir eine Anleitung gegeben. Problem super gelöst.

developer_response.body:
Hi Rhumak!
You can enjoy multiplayer sessions in GymClasses. Select a Gymclass, instead of hitting "Start", press the circular buttom close to it, and share with your friends the generated code, when their are joined, start the session.

Hope this helps!

reviews.review_description: eXRcise  is becoming one of my favorite workout apps. I'm surprised it isn't more well known.  eXRcise is different than other fitness apps because it learns your range of motion during the calibration process. This means it'll know when you aren't reaching your potential. During the gym classes the app will know when you aren't doing the exercise properly and will tell you how to improve. None of my other apps work this way. The mini games are fun and as pointed out by FitProVr great for brain health (I suggest watching his review of this app. Also KaleahVr has one too) . You can choose the type of music you like and it's actually good music, mixed reality, can workout with friends, work out in different environments, there are trainings to help you learn all the exercises before you take a class. What I would do to improve this app is just more of what you're already doing and there are a few grammatical errors which take away from the polished look of the app but not the performance (like saying hitted instead of hit).

developer_response.body:
🥰 Thanks so much for your comments Nahli!!
We´ll keep doing what weé doing... and more!!!
(And also we promise a spelling check 😅)

reviews.review_description: The app is good, but the sounds of the exercises are very unpleasant to the ears…. Please change the sounds🙏

developer_response.body:
Hi Princess Leia!!
Thanks for your rate :)
We consider your comment. Next release is coming soon and, at least, you´ll be able to adjust FX volume. We´ll review sounds for the next ones!
:)

reviews.review_description:
This fitness app is different than the rest I've tried, and it is brilliant. Good exercises with no subscription.
It does require a lot of play space, since you kick in all directions. I really need a MR mode to see the surroundings, but the dev says it is coming.
If you like vr fitness, this is recommended. 👍

developer_response.body:
Hi Ian! Good news for you  ☺️
MR mode is now abailable since last update!!

reviews.review_description: I saw a bunch of VR-fitness-YouTubers all shilling this at the same time (no coincidence I'm sure), and I grabbed a copy.  And hey, it's pretty good actually.  Did they oversell it a little?  Maybe.  I'm not 100% convinced by the gym-classes tbh - a little bit janky (or maybe I'm just not used to the format yet).  But I do like the mini-games.  The sandbag game, and the spin-and-dodge bot are worth the ten quid alone to me.  Plus, I'm a sucker for any beach environment - and we get one here for a little beach-boxing.   Worth checking out for sure - good work.  :)

developer_response.body:
Hi Mr.Voodoo!

Thanks so much for your feedback, we really appreciate!
We´re glad that you like mini-games.
Right now we are working on improving GymClasses, so stay tuned! 😉

reviews.review_description: I love this game it has a lot of variety and the option to work out with your friends is amazing!!!! One thing I would do is add matchmaking so you can work out with someone because no one around me is motivated to work out and that feature alone is cool it’s just unfortunate that it’s not being utilized :(

So not many apps by quest 3 can make me sweaty, but this one dose.

The best part for me is the strength training. I use the dumbbell plus the strength training in this app, and omg, it is amazing! I mean, you have to do the right position for every move, then goes in the next.

I think it just the right tool for me, training with dumbbells.
I will definitely recommend this app as everyday training base for some one like do sport at home.

Pin me, if you want some discount

reviews.review_title: Low key kinda love this game...
reviews.review_description:
Hi friends, it's me, your friendly neighborhood FitProVR. I review this game here, but overall, I think it's a charming fitness app the offers a lot of things that most don't. Here's my full review:
https://youtu.be/lKv3flAxU0g

This is a very promising app if you're planing to go to the gym, but you prefer doing it at home in the virtual reality.
If you're new to sports and want to begin having good health by exercising yourself, this app is for you! You'll find workouts, programs and even gym classes like at the standard gym places!
There is also a punching game with a robot I did like a lot!
Of course, the app is still in development, so be sure to consider it and don't hesitate to give your feedback to the game developers so they can make the app better!
Enjoy!

reviews.review_title: Amazing app to do your daily training
reviews.review_description: It's an amazing app to do your workout routine, it's completely different to other fitness apps that normally offer you like a videogame, in this case it's focus on real training at the same time yo have fun.
The Idea is good, there are still some part which has to be enhanced, but the development is on going and proceed fast. Good potential. Waiting for the final release.
I like the concept of the arcade and the actual classes. With the classes the instructor is a little stiff and not really motivating.
A view bugs but like the app

developer_response.body: Hi, we'd love to hear from you about the bugs you've seen in the app, so please write to us at exrciseads-support@exrciser.com or write to us through our discord group https://discord.gg/M9mMFcDqa6 . This will allow us to improve the experience

reviews.review_description: I use it daily, you have countless exercises, routines and mini-games to fully exercise your body. It works very well, it is easy to use and intuitive.  Totally recommended if you want to be in shape!
